description: Local text-only benchmark serving setup for Qwen3-VL 8B Thinking on LiveCodeBench v6 175 and SWE-bench Multilingual predictive-30.
notes: The installed vLLM 0.19.1 package registers qwen3 and deepseek_r1 reasoning parsers. qwen3 is selected because it explicitly handles Qwen3/Qwen3.5 chat templates where <think> may be in the prompt.

The installed vLLM package registers hermes, qwen3_coder, and qwen3_xml tool parsers. hermes is selected because Qwen3-VL is not a Qwen3-Coder checkpoint and vLLM documents Hermes as the generic Qwen tool-call parser.
This vLLM build did not expose a language-model-only/text-only flag in the installed source tree; benchmark prompts are text-only and use the Qwen3 text chat template.
